title: Problems encountered when using the natural right join and concatws functions together
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 DECIMAL ZEROFILL NOT NULL , PRIMARY KEY(c0)) AUTO_ID_CACHE 100 ;
UPDATE t0 SET c0='0' WHERE t0.c0;
CREATE ALGORITHM=TEMPTABLE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0;
UPDATE t0 SET c0=t0.c0 WHERE CAST(-752460429 AS SIGNED);
ALTER TABLE t0  ORDER BY c0 DESC;
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with CONCAT_WS function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c1));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, c4 DATE DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(c3));
SELECT t1.c2 FROM t1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN t2 WHERE (NOT (CONCAT_WS(t2.c3, (t1.c2 AND t2.c4))));
